Make agent skill installation safe by default

Install bundled wk skill files in place, refuse unknown destination files by default, and require explicit --force intent before installing into a non-empty destination with unknown files.

Home / Decisions
Decision clisafetyagentsinstall

Context

The Codex skill installer writes outside a project repo and may target an existing user skill directory.

Decision

Install bundled wk skill files in place, refuse unknown destination files by default, and require explicit --force intent before installing into a non-empty destination with unknown files.

Consequences

wk install-agent codex avoids blind recursive deletion, preserves unknown files when forced, and keeps agent setup safer for dogfood paths like PRISM.

Related files

  • src/cli/commands/installAgent.ts
  • test/cli.test.js
  • README.md
  • skills/wk/SKILL.md
